## 任务描述

**文件（全部新建）：**
- 创建：`app/[locale]/knowledge/page.tsx`
- 创建：`app/[locale]/knowledge/[slug]/page.tsx`

---

**步骤 1：创建 `app/[locale]/knowledge/page.tsx`**

```tsx
// app/[locale]/knowledge/page.tsx
import type { Metadata } from "next";
import { getTranslations } from "next-intl/server";
import { KnowledgeList } from "@/components/knowledge/knowledge-list";

export async function generateMetadata({
  params,
}: {
  params: { locale: string };
}): Promise<Metadata> {
  const t = await getTranslations({ locale: params.locale, namespace: "knowledge" });
  return {
    title: t("title"),
    description: t("subtitle"),
  };
}

export default function KnowledgePage({
  params,
}: {
  params: { locale: string };
}) {
  return (
    <div className="flex h-[calc(100vh-64px)] overflow-hidden">
      <KnowledgeList locale={params.locale} />
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

**步骤 2：创建 `app/[locale]/knowledge/[slug]/page.tsx`**

```tsx
// app/[locale]/knowledge/[slug]/page.tsx
import { notFound } from "next/navigation";
import type { Metadata } from "next";
import { findKnowledgeItem, getAllSlugs } from "@/lib/knowledge-data";
import { DEMO_REGISTRY } from "@/components/knowledge/demos/_registry";

interface PageProps {
  params: { locale: string; slug: string };
}

export async function generateStaticParams() {
  return getAllSlugs().map((slug) => ({ slug }));
}

export async function generateMetadata({ params }: PageProps): Promise<Metadata> {
  const found = findKnowledgeItem(params.slug);
  if (!found) return {};
  const { item } = found;
  return {
    title: params.locale === "zh" ? item.titleZh : item.titleEn,
    description: params.locale === "zh" ? item.descZh : item.descEn,
  };
}

export default async function KnowledgeDemoPage({ params }: PageProps) {
  const found = findKnowledgeItem(params.slug);
  if (!found) notFound();

  const demoLoader = DEMO_REGISTRY[params.slug];
  if (!demoLoader) notFound();

  const { default: DemoComponent } = await demoLoader();

  return (
    <DemoComponent
      locale={params.locale}
      backHref={`/${params.locale}/knowledge`}
    />
  );
}
```

**步骤 3：Commit**

```bash
git add app/[locale]/knowledge/
git commit -m "feat(knowledge): add list and demo route pages"
```

## 上下文

- 工作目录：`d:\geekiblog\.worktrees\knowledge`（feature/knowledge-module 分支）
- Next.js 14 App Router，`app/[locale]/` 是已有结构
- `app/[locale]/knowledge/` 目录目前是空的，需要在其中创建这两个文件
- 项目使用 next-intl，`getTranslations({ locale, namespace })` 是服务端 API
- `KnowledgeList` 是 "use client" 组件，从 Server Component 调用没问题
- `DEMO_REGISTRY` 里的动态 import 返回 `{ default: ComponentType<DemoProps> }`，在 Server Component 中 `await demoLoader()` 是正确用法
- `generateStaticParams` 返回所有 slug 数组，Next.js 会预渲染对应页面

## 你的工作

创建两个文件，commit，自审并汇报：
- **状态：** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- 创建了什么
- TypeScript 类型有无问题
- 自审发现

{
  "output": "export interface KnowledgeItem {\r\n  slug: string;\r\n  titleZh: string;\r\n  titleEn: string;\r\n  descZh: string;\r\n  descEn: string;\r\n  tagsZh: string[];\r\n  tagsEn: string[];\r\n  icon: string;\r\n  steps: number;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface KnowledgeCategory {\r\n  id: string;\r\n  nameZh: string;\r\n  nameEn: string;\r\n  emoji: string;\r\n  items: KnowledgeItem[];\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport const KNOWLEDGE_CATEGORIES: KnowledgeCategory[] = [\r\n  {\r\n    id: \"react\",\r\n    nameZh: \"React\",\r\n    nameEn: \"React\",\r\n    emoji: \"⚛\",\r\n    items: [\r\n      {\r\n        slug: \"react-diff\",\r\n        titleZh: \"Diff 算法原理\",\r\n        titleEn: \"Diff Algorithm\",\r\n        descZh:\r\n          \"React 如何高效对比新旧 Virtual DOM？理解三大假设、同层比较策略与 key 的关键作用。\",\r\n        descEn:\r\n          \"How React efficiently diffs Virtual DOM trees. Three assumptions, same-level comparison, and the role of keys.\",\r\n        tagsZh: [\"6 步动画\", \"树结构可视化\", \"代码高亮\"],\r\n        tagsEn: [\"6-step animation\", \"tree visualization\", \"code highlight\"],\r\n        icon: \"🌳\",\r\n        steps: 6,\r\n      },\r\n    ],\r\n  },\r\n  {\r\n    id: \"javascript\",\r\n    nameZh: \"JavaScript\",\r\n    nameEn: \"JavaScript\",\r\n    emoji: \"🟡\",\r\n    items: [],\r\n  },\r\n  {\r\n    id: \"react-native\",\r\n    nameZh: \"React Native\",\r\n    nameEn: \"React Native\",\r\n    emoji: \"📱\",\r\n    items: [],\r\n  },\r\n  {\r\n    id: \"css\",\r\n    nameZh: \"CSS\",\r\n    nameEn: \"CSS\",\r\n    emoji: \"🎨\",\r\n    items: [],\r\n  },\r\n];\r\n\r\n/** 根据 slug 查找 item 及所属 category */\r\nexport function findKnowledgeItem(slug: string): {\r\n  item: KnowledgeItem;\r\n  category: KnowledgeCategory;\r\n} | null {\r\n  for (const category of KNOWLEDGE_CATEGORIES) {\r\n    const item = category.items.find((i) => i.slug === slug);\r\n    if (item) return { item, category };\r\n  }\r\n  return null;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** 获取所有 slug（用于 generateStaticParams） */\r\nexport function getAllSlugs(): string[] {\r\n  return KNOWLEDGE_CATEGORIES.flatMap((c) => c.items.map((i) => i.slug));\r\n}\r\n",

}

## 🤖 Assistant #27 (Agent)

_2026-05-01 08:52:43Z_

---

**状态：DONE**

**创建了什么**

- `app/[locale]/knowledge/page.tsx` — 知识库列表路由页面，Server Component，生成 SEO metadata，渲染 `<KnowledgeList locale={...} />`
- `app/[locale]/knowledge/[slug]/page.tsx` — 知识点 Demo 路由页面，Server Component，支持 `generateStaticParams` 静态预渲染，动态加载 `DEMO_REGISTRY` 中对应的 Demo 组件

**TypeScript 类型**

无问题：
- `findKnowledgeItem` 返回 `{ item, category } | null`，`notFound()` 调用后 TypeScript narrowing 正常
- `DEMO_REGISTRY` 的类型明确为 `Record<string, () => Promise<{ default: ComponentType<DemoProps> }>>` ，`await demoLoader()` 解构出 `DemoComponent` 类型安全
- `DemoProps` 接口中 `locale` 和 `backHref` 与页面传入完全匹配

**自审发现**

- CRLF → LF 的 Git 警告属正常 Windows 行为，不影响功能
- `generateStaticParams` 中没有带 `locale`，只返回 `{ slug }`，符合 Next.js 在嵌套动态段场景下 slug 页面各自独立生成的约定（locale 由父级 `[locale]` 段处理）
- 列表页用 `h-[calc(100vh-64px)] overflow-hidden` 实现全高布局，与 `KnowledgeList` 内部的 sidebar + scroll 设计配套正确

---
